zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Moulton於1758年1月10日出生在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛時，她的父親Captain Daniel Moulton26歲，母親Grace Reynolds29歲。她於大約1775年與Nathaniel Fenderson Jr在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1837年3月16日在她的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Moulton于1758年1月10日出生在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛时，她的父亲Captain Daniel Moulton26岁，母亲Grace Reynolds29岁。她于大约1775年与Nathaniel Fenderson Jr在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1837年3月16日在她的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: Whitehead Light
historicEvents.description: In 1804, President Thomas Jefferson authorized the creation of a light station on Whitehead Island. The light house went into service by 1807. It is the third-oldest light house in Maine. Whitehead Light still exists as the private property of Pine Island Camp, a non-profit organization.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Moulton was born on 10 January 1758, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States, her father, Captain Daniel Moulton, was 26 and her mother, Grace Reynolds, was 29. She married Nathaniel Fenderson Jr about 1775, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 16 March 1837, in her hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Moulton est née le 10 janvier 1758, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Captain Daniel Moulton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Grace Reynolds, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Fenderson Jr environ 1775, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1837, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Moulton am 10. Januar 1758 in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Captain Daniel Moulton 26 und ihre Mutter Grace Reynolds 29. Sie hat um 1775 in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Nathaniel Fenderson Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. März 1837 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Moulton è nata il il 10 gennaio 1758 nel Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Captain Daniel Moulton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Grace Reynolds, aveva 29 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Moultonが1758年1月10日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウで生まれた時，父Captain Daniel Moultonは26歳，母Grace Reynoldsは29歳であった。約1775年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウでNathaniel Fenderson Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1837年3月16日に故郷で79歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Moulton(이)가 1758년 1월 10일 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Captain Daniel Moulton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Reynolds(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1775년 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 Nathaniel Fenderson Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1837년 3월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Moulton nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1758, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Captain Daniel Moulton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Grace Reynolds, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Fenderson Jr aproximadamente 1775, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1837, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Moulton родилась 10 января 1758 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Captain Daniel Moulton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Reynolds, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Fenderson Jr около 1775 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 16 марта 1837 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Nathaniel Fenderson Jr aproximadamente 1775, en Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1837, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos.
